things.name: Tak Bat (Almsgiving Ceremony)
things.description: Dawn procession of orange-robed monks collecting alms - deeply spiritual and moving

things.name: Kuang Si Waterfalls
things.description: Turquoise travertine pools and a 50m main waterfall with a bear rescue sanctuary

things.name: Royal Palace Museum
things.description: Last royal palace of the Kingdom of Laos with the sacred Pha Bang gold Buddha

things.name: Wat Xieng Thong
things.description: Finest temple in Laos with a sweeping multi-tiered roof and mosaics of the tree of life

things.name: Mount Phousi
things.description: Hilltop stupa with 360-degree sunset views over the Mekong and Nam Khan rivers

things.name: Mekong River Slow Boat
things.description: Two-day slow boat journey down the Mekong through spectacular jungle scenery

things.name: Night Market
things.description: Nightly textile market with indigo-dyed fabrics, silver jewellery and local handicrafts

things.name: Old Town Walking Tour
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage peninsula with 33 temples between the Mekong and Nam Khan

things.name: Pak Ou Caves
things.description: River-mouth caves crammed with thousands of Buddha images - accessible by boat

things.name: Tad Sae Waterfall
things.description: Accessible by boat and elephant - beautiful tiered waterfall for swimming
